metadata.description: Disneyland Paris locations for the heat & queue planning map.
metadata.accuracy: Coordinates are now sourced from OpenStreetMap (Overpass API, June 2026) and should be accurate to each attraction's footprint; the brand-new World of Frozen rides (Frozen Ever After and its show/shop), not yet mapped in OSM, are placed within the correct land by anchoring to their mapped neighbours. Premier Access, A/C status and rider heights remain curated from public 2026 info — edit this one file to correct anything.
metadata.notes: Walt Disney Studios Park was reimagined as 'Disney Adventure World' on 29 March 2026; World of Frozen / Frozen Ever After opened the same day. 2026-06-21: greatly expanded amenity, shop and snack-stand coverage from OpenStreetMap (toilets, water fountains, gift shops, rentals and quick-service snack kiosks); toilet/water points are unnamed in OSM and are labelled by land. A/C status for the new shops/snacks is a best-effort default — correct anything that's off.

properties.name: Big Thunder Mountain
properties.heatNote: Sun-baked outdoor queue on the island. Use Premier Access or save for the cooler evening.

properties.name: Phantom Manor
properties.heatNote: Mostly indoor and shaded queue; good midday heat break. Slow boats/cars in the cool dark.

properties.name: Pirates of the Caribbean
properties.heatNote: Excellent cooling refuge — cool stone interior queue and a long indoor boat ride. No Premier Access, but the indoor queue itself is pleasant in the heat.

properties.name: Indiana Jones et le Temple du Péril
properties.heatNote: Outdoor jungle queue and outdoor coaster. Use Premier Access; tall riders only (140 cm).

properties.name: Adventure Isle & Swiss Family Treehouse
properties.heatNote: Outdoor walkthrough with lots of climbing and stairs — tough on a knee and in full sun. Skip at midday.

properties.name: It's a Small World
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned boat ride, covered queue. Ideal cooling break for a young child.

properties.name: Peter Pan's Flight
properties.heatNote: Indoor queue and ride — cool and shaded, but a perennial long line. Premier Access strongly recommended.

properties.name: Dumbo the Flying Elephant
properties.heatNote: Fully exposed outdoor queue with slow loading. Avoid in midday heat; ride early or after dusk.

properties.name: Le Carrousel de Lancelot
properties.heatNote: Outdoor carousel, short queue. Roof gives a little shade once aboard.

properties.name: Mad Hatter's Tea Cups
properties.heatNote: Spinning cups under a covered canopy — shaded but not air-conditioned.

properties.name: Alice's Curious Labyrinth
properties.heatNote: Outdoor hedge maze in full sun with lots of walking. Poor choice during peak heat.

properties.name: Le Pays des Contes de Fées (Storybook Land)
properties.heatNote: Gentle outdoor canal boat. Exposed queue but the ride itself is calm and breezy.

properties.name: Mickey's PhilharMagic
properties.heatNote: Indoor seated 4D cinema — one of the best air-conditioned refuges. Frequent showings keep the queue short.

properties.name: Star Wars Hyperspace Mountain (Space Mountain)
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned queue and ride. Cool refuge and a headliner — use Premier Access. 120 cm minimum.

properties.name: Star Tours: The Adventures Continue
properties.heatNote: Fully indoor air-conditioned queue and simulator — a top midday cooling refuge. 102 cm minimum.

properties.name: Buzz Lightyear Laser Blast
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned queue and shooting ride. Great cool break for all ages.

properties.name: Orbitron
properties.heatNote: Exposed outdoor spinner. Skip in peak heat.

properties.name: Autopia
properties.heatNote: Hot petrol cars in a fully exposed queue and track — one of the worst heat options. 81 cm to ride with an adult.

properties.name: Disneyland Railroad — Main Street Station
properties.heatNote: Covered station platform; a shaded way to circle the park and rest the legs, though trains are open-air.

properties.name: Disney Stars on Parade
properties.heatNote: Daytime parade along Main Street — viewing spots are in full sun. Grab shade or skip in favour of the evening show.

properties.name: Evening Castle Show (Disney Dreams / D-Light)
properties.heatNote: After-dark show on the castle — cooler evening timing. Stake out a spot late, not during the heat of the day.

properties.name: The Lion King: Rhythms of the Pride Lands
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned theatre show at Chaparral Theater — excellent way to sit out the midday heat. Check showtimes.

properties.name: Walt's — An American Restaurant
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned table service on Main Street. Book ahead; a comfortable midday escape.

properties.name: Plaza Gardens Restaurant
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned buffet near the castle. Good for an early lunch (≈11:15) before the rush and the heat.

properties.name: Casey's Corner
properties.heatNote: Counter-service hot dogs on Main Street. Indoor seating is shaded but only lightly cooled.

properties.name: Cowboy Cookout Barbecue
properties.heatNote: Counter-service barbecue in a covered barn — shaded but not strongly air-conditioned.

properties.name: Blue Lagoon Restaurant
properties.heatNote: Table service inside Pirates of the Caribbean — dark, cool and air-conditioned. One of the best midday refuges. Book ahead.

properties.name: Au Chalet de la Marionnette
properties.heatNote: Large air-conditioned counter-service in Fantasyland — handy cool lunch spot for families.

properties.name: Café Hyperion
properties.heatNote: Huge air-conditioned counter-service hall in Discoveryland — lots of cool indoor seating to escape the midday sun.

properties.name: Emporium
properties.heatNote: Large air-conditioned Main Street store — a long cool browse, and you can walk much of Main Street indoors through connected shops.

properties.name: Thunder Mesa Mercantile Building
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned Frontierland store — a cool stop between Big Thunder and Phantom Manor.

properties.name: Meet Mickey Mouse
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned character meet (Cottonwood Creek/Fantasyland) — queue is cool, unlike outdoor character lines.

properties.name: First Aid & Baby Care Center
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned first aid and baby-care rooms near Central Plaza — cool, quiet space if anyone overheats.

properties.name: Water Fountain — Main Street
properties.heatNote: Free drinking-water point — refill bottles often. Ask any counter-service for free tap water too.

properties.name: Toilets — Discoveryland
properties.heatNote: Restrooms near Café Hyperion.

properties.name: Blanche-Neige et les Sept Nains (Snow White)
properties.heatNote: Indoor Fantasyland dark ride with a covered queue — a quick, cool shaded break for little ones.

properties.name: Les Voyages de Pinocchio
properties.heatNote: Indoor dark ride next to Snow White; covered queue and a cool, gentle ride.

properties.name: Casey Jr. – le Petit Train du Cirque
properties.heatNote: Outdoor kiddie coaster around Storybook Land. Exposed queue — ride early or in the cooler evening.

properties.name: Les Mystères du Nautilus
properties.heatNote: Walk-through of Captain Nemo's submarine — indoor, dark and cool with no real queue. A handy Discoveryland heat refuge.

properties.name: La Tanière du Dragon
properties.heatNote: The dragon's cave beneath the castle — a short, dark, cool walk-through. Stairs at the entrance/exit. Good quick escape from the sun.

properties.name: Princess Pavilion
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned princess meet. Queue can be long; the meeting room itself is a cool refuge — go early or use a return time if offered.

properties.name: Le Passage Enchanté d'Aladdin
properties.heatNote: Indoor Aladdin story walk-through in Adventureland — shaded, brief and crowd-free; a small heat break with no height limit.

properties.name: Thunder Mesa Riverboat Landing
properties.heatNote: Paddle-steamer cruise around Big Thunder. Exposed open-air deck and queue, but a breezy way to rest the legs.

properties.name: Rustler Roundup Shootin' Gallery
properties.heatNote: Outdoor coin-op shooting gallery in Frontierland (small extra fee). Fully exposed — quick stop only.

properties.name: Main Street Vehicles
properties.heatNote: Vintage cars and horse-drawn streetcars up Main Street. Open-air and weather-dependent — a leg-saver, not a heat escape.

properties.name: Disneyland Railroad — Frontierland Depot
properties.heatNote: Covered station platform in Frontierland; a shaded place to board the train and circle the park while resting.

properties.name: Disneyland Railroad — Fantasyland Station
properties.heatNote: Covered Fantasyland station platform; shaded boarding point for a restful loop of the park.

properties.name: Disneyland Railroad — Discoveryland Station
properties.heatNote: Covered Discoveryland station platform; shaded boarding point and a way to skip a hot walk back to Main Street.

properties.name: Videopolis Théâtre
properties.heatNote: Large air-conditioned Discoveryland theatre (currently The Jungle Book show). One of the best seated midday cool-downs — check showtimes.

properties.name: The Twilight Zone Tower of Terror
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned queue and ride — cool refuge as well as a thrill. Use Premier Access. 102 cm minimum.

properties.name: Crush's Coaster
properties.heatNote: Notoriously long, fully exposed outdoor queue — brutal in the heat. Premier Access is almost essential here. 107 cm minimum.

properties.name: Ratatouille: The Adventure
properties.heatNote: Mostly indoor, air-conditioned trackless ride with a partly covered queue — a strong cool headliner. Use Premier Access.

properties.name: Cars ROAD TRIP
properties.heatNote: Covered queue but an open-air tram ride through outdoor scenes. Pleasant in the morning or evening.

properties.name: RC Racer
properties.heatNote: Exposed outdoor queue and ride in Toy Story Playland. Use Premier Access; 120 cm minimum.

properties.name: Toy Soldiers Parachute Drop
properties.heatNote: Fully exposed Toy Story Playland queue. Use Premier Access; 81 cm minimum.

properties.name: Slinky Dog Zigzag Spin
properties.heatNote: Exposed outdoor spinner for younger kids. Best early or late, not midday.

properties.name: Spider-Man W.E.B. Adventure
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned queue and interactive ride in Avengers Campus — great family cool break. Use Premier Access.

properties.name: Avengers Assemble: Flight Force
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned launch coaster in Avengers Campus. Use Premier Access; 120 cm minimum.

properties.name: Frozen Ever After
properties.heatNote: New World of Frozen indoor air-conditioned boat ride — cool and gentle, ideal for a 3-year-old. Expect big demand; use Premier Access.

properties.name: TOGETHER: a Pixar Musical Adventure
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned theatre musical — a comfortable, seated midday cool-down. Check showtimes.

properties.name: Mickey and the Magician
properties.heatNote: Indoor air-conditioned stage show at Animagique Theater — excellent heat refuge with great air-conditioning.

properties.name: World of Frozen Daytime Show
properties.heatNote: Outdoor show in Arendelle — viewing is in the sun. Find shade or catch a later performance.

properties.name: Bistrot Chez Rémy
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned table service beside Ratatouille — a cool, fun lunch. Book ahead.

properties.name: PYM Kitchen
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned buffet in Avengers Campus — plenty of cool indoor seating during the hot hours.

properties.name: Stark Factory
properties.heatNote: Large air-conditioned Italian counter/table service in Avengers Campus — easy cool lunch.

properties.name: World of Frozen Shop & Tavern
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned shop and tavern in Arendelle — a cool stop in the newest land.

properties.name: First Aid & Baby Care Center (Disney Adventure World)
properties.heatNote: Air-conditioned first aid and baby-care near the park entrance — cool space to recover from the heat.

properties.name: Cars Quatre Roues Rallye
properties.heatNote: Outdoor Cars-themed spinner. Exposed queue and ride — best in the morning or evening, not at midday.

properties.name: Raiponce Tangled Spin
properties.heatNote: New Tangled-themed outdoor spinner on the edge of World of Frozen. Exposed — ride outside the peak heat.

properties.name: Les Tapis Volants – Flying Carpets Over Agrabah
properties.heatNote: Aladdin magic-carpet spinner. Fully exposed queue and ride; one for the cooler parts of the day.
